description: Manga drama storyboard template for creative storytelling content. Uses manga-drama skill pipeline: character image generation -> style application -> multi-scene video.

protagonist_entrance.purpose: Establishing shot, character introduction. Set the world and introduce the protagonist.
protagonist_entrance.camera_guidance: PB to BM -- start wide to show environment, then move to handheld following character
protagonist_entrance.audio_guidance: Ambient environment sounds, optional dramatic music swell
content_rules: Character must be clearly visible and identifiable
Movement required -- character walking, turning, or interacting

action_scene.purpose: Dynamic movement, conflict or demonstration. The story's rising action.
action_scene.camera_guidance: SPI + CU -- push in for intensity, close-ups for action detail
action_scene.audio_guidance: Heightened audio: action sounds, faster music, dramatic effects
content_rules: Product can be introduced as tool or discovery
Speed lines or motion blur for dynamic feel

emotional_expression.purpose: Close-up on reaction, sentiment peak. The emotional core of the story.
emotional_expression.camera_guidance: CU + RF -- tight on face/reaction, rack focus for depth
emotional_expression.audio_guidance: Quiet moment or emotional music peak, subtle ambient sounds
content_rules: Focus on character facial expression or gesture
Convey clear emotion: joy, surprise, determination
Product may be present but character is the focus

interaction_scene.purpose: Product interaction, before/after comparison. Connect story to commerce.
interaction_scene.camera_guidance: CU + PAN -- close-up on product interaction, pan to show transformation
interaction_scene.audio_guidance: Satisfying interaction sounds, upbeat transition music

ending_freeze.purpose: Final pose, brand moment, CTA. The story's conclusion and commercial payoff.
ending_freeze.camera_guidance: PB to FF -- pull back for full composition, freeze on final pose
ending_freeze.audio_guidance: Music resolution, trending sound fadeout, CTA narration
content_rules: Character in triumphant or satisfied pose with product
Link in bio call to action
Loop-friendly ending that connects back to scene 1
